## New Homes for Sale in Skye Canyon

There are currently 13 new homes for sale in Skye Canyon at a median listing price of $605K. Some of these homes are "Hot Homes," meaning they're likely to sell quickly. Most homes for sale in Skye Canyon stay on the market for 64 days and receive 4 offers. Popular neighborhoods include Centennial Hills , Northwest Las Vegas , Northern Terrace at Providence , Tule Springs , and Kyle Canyon . This map is refreshed with the newest listings in Skye Canyon every 15 minutes.

In the past month, 18 homes have been sold in Skye Canyon.
In addition to houses in Skye Canyon, there was also 1 condo, 4 townhouses, and 0 multi-family units for sale in Skye Canyon last month. Find your dream home in Skye Canyon using the tools above. Use filters to narrow your search by price, square feet, beds, and baths to find homes that fit your criteria. Our top-rated real estate agents in Skye Canyon are local experts and are ready to answer your questions about properties, neighborhoods, schools, and the newest listings for sale in Skye Canyon. If you're looking to sell your home in the Skye Canyon area, our listing agents can help you get the best price. Redfin is redefining real estate and the home buying process in Skye Canyon with industry-leading technology, full-service agents, and lower fees that provide a better value for Redfin buyers and sellers.

## Professional Real Estate Photography, That Helps Home Sell

#### Premium Listing Photos for Agents, Brokers & Property Managers

Whether you’re listing a starter home, a luxury property, or a short-term rental, clean and compelling imagery can make all the difference. I provide sharp, well-lit, MLS-optimized images with quick turnaround times to help you market your properties with confidence.

Empty kitchen with wooden cabinets, black refrigerator, black stove, granite countertops, and a double sink

### What’s Included

✅ High-resolution and MLS-optimized images

Backyard of a house with a lawn, a small storage shed, and outdoor seating area with a shade cloth, trees, and an air conditioning unit, under a bright blue sky with clouds. Backyard with white house, green grass, trees, and a storage shed under a blue sky.

* How quickly are images delivered?
  
  Most galleries are delivered within 24–48 hours, depending on the size of the property and services booked.
* Are the photos MLS ready?
  
  marketing use, with consistent color and verticals.
* How do I book a session?
  
  Sessions can be booked online through my scheduling system. Once booked, you’ll receive confirmation and next steps automatically.

### Frequently Asked Questions

* Do you work with both agents and property owners?
  
  Yes. I work with real estate agents, brokers, and property owners preparing homes for sale or marketing.
* What areas do you serve?
  
  I serve all of Southern Maryland and surrounding regions. Travel fees may apply outside the standard service area.
